The [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] '''Model J1 "Happy Surprise" Palm Blaster''' was a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] that looked similar to the [[Stealth-2VX palm shooter/Legends|Stealth-2VX palm shooter]]. The J1 resembled a grip with a tiny barrel sticking out from the front, protruding from between the user's fingers. It was activated by a thumb trigger on the top of the weapon. The J1's biggest strength was its ease of concealment, as its construction allowed it to be hidden in nothing more than the user's clenched fist.<ref name="AEG" />

The weapon's name was actually the weapon's name in [[Rodese/Legends|Rodese]]—''Kheth-saw''—translated to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]].<ref name="AEG" /> [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] operative [[Matt Talon]] carried a ''Happy Surprise'' as part of his personal arsenal.<ref name="GG9" />
